title: ProDec Zipped Doorway Dust Protector Heavy Duty Transparent Polythene Sheet For Preventing Dust Transfer Between Rooms During Renovations, Building Work and Construction
features: Simple solution to a common problem of how to stop dust spreading
Heavy duty polythene sheet gives a dustproof and waterproof barrier and prevents dust transfer between rooms
Self-adhesive zip gives easy two-way access whilst work is in progress
Simple to set up: trim sheet as required, fix pre-taped zip, tape to door and cut sheet down middle of zip
2.1m x 1.2m (7' x 4') sheet fits standard doorways - includes sheet and pre-taped zip
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint 4 easy steps to creating a dustproof barrier between rooms Fix the sheet in place The polythene sheet fixes to standard doorways with masking tape or other tape (not supplied). It can be trimmed to size as required to fit most single door architraves. Apply the pre-taped zip The zip is pre-fitted with double sided tape so it applies quickly and easily. Handy hint: you may find it easier to apply the zip first while the sheet is flat on the floor. Cut down the zip Use a sharp knife to carefully cut the polythene down the middle of the zip. Instant 2-way barrier Unzip to pass through the barrier and zip back up to prevent dust moving from room to room. Say goodbye to dust transfer This product is a simple solution to a problem often encountered when carrying out building, renovation, sanding, or any work that creates dust: how to stop the dust getting into other rooms. The Zipped Doorway Protector consists of a 2.1m x 1.2m (7' x 4') sheet of durable polythene that fits standard doorways plus a self-adhesive zip. The sheet attaches to the door frame with masking tape or other tape (not included), forming a dustproof and waterproof barrier. It can be easily trimmed to size as required for the best fit using either scissors or a sharp knife. The zip is applied down the middle of the sheet and then a sharp knife is run down the middle of the zip to cut the sheet and give easy two-way access to and from the area whilst works are under way. Handy hints: It's easier to apply the zip when the sheet is laid flat on the floor than when it's taped in place over the doorway - you can also press it on more firmly, so it sticks to the polythene sheet better and you'll apply it straighter. Decide whether you want the zip to go all the way to the bottom of the sheet so it opens in an inverted V shape, or whether you prefer to tape the bottom of the sheet to the floor when it's in place for maximum barrier protection, in which case you may not want the zip to go all the way to the bottom. You can always cut the zip to size if required. More temporary protection solutions from ProDec ProDec has a range of products for protecting floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust, dirt and more during decorating and general maintenance work. Polythene dust sheets Made from waterproof recyclable LDPE material and available in both sheets and rolls, polythene is lightweight and cost-effective. Super Cling Super Cling is waterproof recyclable LDPE material that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Self-adhesive films Made from puncture resistant polythene that enables it to withstand heavy traffic, ProDec’s self-adhesive film protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more. It applies easily without the need for any special application tools and stays in place once down. Available in Carpet, Hard Floor and Glass grades. Cotton dust sheets Classic cotton twill fabric that soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. Available in a range of sizes in both standard and Protector waterproof plastic backed versions.
